arts.ttl: Man City agree £29.4m deal to sign Palmeiras defender Vitor Reis... with the Brazilian set to be one of THREE signings this month
arts.sum: : The Brazilian defender will link up with Pep Guardiola's side immediately rather than stay in Brazil for the Club World Cup.

arts.ttl: Brentford vs Man City Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Manchester City will look to continue their resurgence when they take on Brentford in west London in the Premier League tonight. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provid...

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano gives 'HERE WE GO CONFIRMED' for ANOTHER Man City signing
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has given his customary 'Here We Go' to confirm another Man City signing, this time of Brazilian wonderkid Vitor Reis. City plan on bringing Reis to the Etihad immediately, so he can play the second half of the season in England rather than wait until the summer.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool & Arsenal also monitoring €80m Man City transfer target
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal are also monitoring the situation of Eintracht Frankfurt forward Omar Marmoush as Manchester City work on a potential €80m deal. Sources have told CaughtOffside that City have been negotiating for Marmoush and there is some confidence of getting the deal done, though one stumbling block is the high asking price and Eintracht’s […] The post Exclusive: Liverpool & Arsenal also monitoring €80m Man City transfer target appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Inside Pep Guardiola's shock split from wife with 'no third party' involved
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola and his wife of 30 years, Cristina Serra, have split according to reports in Spain, but the couple are said to be on amicable terms

arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid have decided not to sign £29m star who's about to join Man City, they have one big worry
arts.sum: Real Madrid were really interested in signing the Manchester City-bound star as well 👀

arts.ttl: Manchester City Predicted Lineup vs. Brentford: Premier League
arts.sum: Manchester City will look to make it four wins in a row when they take on Brentford in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker 'throws leaving party after talks to move to Italy with wife Annie Kilner'
arts.sum: Manchester City player Kyle Walker is said to be considering a move as part of the January transfer window, with his wife Annie Kilner expected to join him if he moves abroad

arts.ttl: Manchester City offer accepted – Player to move ‘right now’ after Guardiola’s side take stance
arts.sum: On Monday, Palmeiras president Leila Pereira revealed that negotiations are ongoing with Manchester City after they tabled an official bid for Vitor Reis. Leila Pereira also stated the bid didn’t meet the fee requested by the Brazilian club, who aren’t in a rush to sell the 19-year-old. ESPN in Brazil say Palmeiras want to retain The post Manchester City offer accepted – Player to move ‘right now’ after Guardiola’s side take stance appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: End of an era! Six Man City treble-winners who need to follow Kyle Walker out of the Etihad as Pep Guardiola's rebuild kicks into gear
arts.sum: With his performances spiralling, him losing his place in the team - his last start was in the derby defeat by Manchester United on December 15 - and facing vitriolic criticism on social media, it is understandable that Walker has had enough and is seeking an exit in the middle of the season. The timing of the revelation that Kyle Walker has asked to leave Manchester City - dropped by Pep Guardiola in the middle of the press conference after the 8-0 drubbing of Salford City - might have been surprising.
